subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the Command and revealed the Book, and Who hath spoken without veil or concealment, causing all things to speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من انزل الامر و انزل الکتاب و نطق من غیر ستر و حجاب و انطق الاشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @high station of the true believer, @suffering; rejection of Christ
